# frontegg_tenant_api_token (Resource)

Manages an API token for a Frontegg tenant. API tokens (client credentials) allow machine-to-machine authentication. The token secret is only available at creation time and cannot be retrieved later. Any change to token attributes requires replacement.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "frontegg_tenant_api_token" "example" {
  tenant_id   = "your-tenant-id"
  description = "CI/CD pipeline token"

  role_ids = [
    frontegg_role.admin.id,
  ]

  # Optional: token expires after 30 days
  expires_in_minutes = 43200

  # Optional: custom JWT metadata
  metadata = jsonencode({
    service = "ci-pipeline"
    env     = "production"
  })
}

output "api_token_client_id" {
  value = frontegg_tenant_api_token.example.client_id
}

output "api_token_secret" {
  value     = frontegg_tenant_api_token.example.secret
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `tenant_id` (String) The ID of the tenant that owns this API token.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A human-readable description for the API token.
- `expires_in_minutes` (Number) Token expiration time in minutes. Omit or set to 0 for a non-expiring token.
- `metadata` (String) A JSON object of custom metadata to encode into the token's JWT claims.
- `role_ids` (Set of String) List of role IDs to assign to this API token.

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) The client ID of the API token. Used for authentication.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the token was created.
- `expires` (String) The expiration timestamp of the token, if set.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The client secret of the API token. Only available at creation time. Store this value securely — it cannot be retrieved after creation.
